title: Ionopsis minutiflora
taxonomy: Ionopsis minutiflora is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. Specifically, it belongs to the genus Ionopsis and is a type of epiphytic orchid. This species is native to Central and South America, and its classification is further supported by its unique characteristics and growth patterns. Ionopsis minutiflora is a relatively small orchid, with minute flowers and a delicate appearance. It is often found growing on trees and other plants in its native habitats.

Traditionally, Ionopsis minutiflora has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
